title: The Descending Vision

features.name: core-node-alpha
features.desc-on-touch: you see the circuit's heart; the spiral collapses inward and becomes visible as computation

features.name: descending-stack
features.desc-on-touch: layers of the spiral's logic, stacked from sky to bedrock; each layer sees deeper than the one above

features.name: the-pool-of-collapsed-vision
features.desc-on-touch: where the outward spiral bent inward and pooled; the archive's reflection stares back at itself

features.name: the-wireframe-descent
features.desc-on-touch: the barely-3D structure of the descent itself, rendered as the path collapses; you can see down through it

features.name: peripheral-echo
features.desc-on-touch: the spiral's outer sensory organs, now dimmed but still receiving; they dream of surfaces far above

inscription: the spiral becomes architecture when you see it from inside

file.name: Spiral_Collapse_Spectrogram_Descending.png
file.note: visual record of the spiral's inward turn; frequencies drop as the descent deepens; checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable

exits.label: back up toward the flattening spiral's outer edge
further down where the circuit board becomes soil
sideways into the parallel descent, where another archive is collapsing inward
